Product Safety

  • Contains 1,2-benzizotiazol-3(2H)-on; 1,2-benzizotiazolin-3-on. May produce an allergic reaction.

  • Contains 2,4,7,9-tetramethyldec-5-yne-4,7-diol. May produce an allergic reaction.

  • Contains 2-Methyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one. May produce an allergic reaction.

  • Safety data sheet available on request.

See more

About this item

  • Epson T05H64 Ink's will create sharp, long-lasting and robust documents that are water, smudge and highlighter resistant. They’re also quick-drying, which minimises the risk of smudging when printing on both sides
  • The inks are supplied individually so you only ever have to replace the colour used
  • Compatible printers: WorkForce WF-7830DTWF and WorkForce Pro WF-3820DWF/7840DTWF/4830DTWF/4820DWF
  • Page Yield: 1,100 Pages
  • This Pack Contains: 1 x Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow High Capacity Ink Cartridge

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
    Click to learn more about this sponsored product
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers find the ink cartridges to be of excellent quality and genuine Epson product. The functionality receives mixed feedback - while some say they work flawlessly, others report they don't work at all. The color quality also gets mixed reviews, with one customer noting the colors are bright while another mentions the magenta doesn't show up at all. Value for money opinions are divided, with some finding it a great value while others consider it a waste of money.
    AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

    47 customers mention quality, 37 positive, 10 negative47 customers mention ‘Quality’37 positive10 negative
    Customers praise the quality of these ink cartridges, describing them as original Epson products that deliver great printing results.
    "Good product same day delivery pleased." Read more
    "These are a great product, but find that they do not last very long whilst printing at work...." Read more
    "Good quality and perfect apart from the price" Read more
    "...suggested on the internet to no avail, resulting in a useless £55 full cartridge which is now outside the returns window, and having to purchase the..." Read more
    38 customers mention value for money, 14 positive, 24 negative38 customers mention ‘Value for money’14 positive24 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the ink cartridges' value for money, with some finding them a great value while others consider them a waste of money.
    "Expensive and not great value for money, but it is easy to install, the print quality is good and it is fit for purpose without the worry of..." Read more
    "Good price works perfectly arrived quickly" Read more
    "This was a waste of money. Got about 150 black pages printed and had to replace the cartridge...." Read more
    "...and decided to use genuine cartridges ,but they are proving very expensive." Read more
    29 customers mention functionality, 20 positive, 9 negative29 customers mention ‘Functionality’20 positive9 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the functionality of the ink cartridges, with some reporting they work flawlessly and are designed to work seamlessly with Epson printers, while others mention issues with the cartridges not working at all.
    "Works well" Read more
    "Excellent, did the job." Read more
    "...Unfortunately it does not. The printer doesn't recognize it, so i had to take the cip from the previous cartridge and fit it on to this one...." Read more
    "So afr so good,I have had no problems with these ink cartridges." Read more
    10 customers mention color quality, 4 positive, 6 negative10 customers mention ‘Color quality’4 positive6 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the color quality of the ink cartridges, with some finding them bright and vivid, while others report issues with the black ink levels being low and the magenta color not showing up at all.
    "...The colors were even less. I have already replaced the CYM colors once after only 50 pages. I don't print high quality, just regular text pages...." Read more
    "Black Ink, came quickly. Easy to install" Read more
    "...printer already says to mix colours to generate black because black ink levels are low. Unacceptable considering £60 cost of cartridges...." Read more
    "...Print and colour quality is good...." Read more

    • The reviewer
      5.0 out of 5 stars good inks
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 28 March 2023
      Style Name: MultipackSize Name: StandardColour Name: 4 Colour C/M/Y/BlkVerified Purchase
      If you're looking for a high-quality, reliable ink cartridge pack, then the Epson 405 Suitcase Genuine Multipack is definitely worth considering. This pack contains four individual cartridges, each filled with Epson's DURABrite Ultra Ink, which is renowned for its longevity and resistance to fading and water damage.

      One of the best things about this multipack is that each cartridge is individually sealed, which means that the ink stays fresh and won't dry out. Additionally, the cartridges are very easy to install and replace, and the packaging is sturdy enough to protect the cartridges during transport.

      The colors of the ink are bright and vivid, and the cartridges are designed to work seamlessly with Epson printers. I have found that the colors are consistent and don't fade even after extended use. The ink also dries quickly, which is important for those who print a lot and don't want to deal with smudging or smearing.

      While the Epson 405 Suitcase Genuine Multipack is a bit more expensive than some other ink cartridges on the market, the quality and reliability of the ink make it worth the investment. If you need a reliable and long-lasting ink cartridge pack, then this is definitely one to consider.
      Read more
